Title: [Process Doc Update]: Create README for OctoAcme Project Management Docs

This PR adds docs/README.md which serves as an index and entry point for OctoAcme project management process documentation.

Summary of changes:
- Adds docs/README.md with an overview, navigation links to all process docs, quick start guidance, contribution instructions, and a brief overview of OctoAcme project management processes.

Related issue: ocag305/skills-scale-institutional-knowledge-using-copilot-spaces#2

Acceptance criteria (from issue #2):
- [x] Content aligns with existing process docs
- [x] Update improves clarity or closes a documented gap
- [x] Proposed content has been reviewed with stakeholders (if needed)

Please review and add any feedback.
